prompt: A spritesheet of 4x4 tiles for a fantasy strategy game. 4 variants of lush green grass, 4 variants of dry grass with small flowers, 8 variants of dirt roads including horizontal, vertical, turns, t-junctions, and crossroad. Top-down view, 2D hand-painted style, Heroes of Might and Magic 3 aesthetic. Each tile is 256x256 pixels. Seamless when tiled. No text.
